channel.title: Vim on Hemanth Kumar Motukuri
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on Hemanth Kumar Motukuri

item.title: Vim Commands for DevOps Engineers
item.description:
Vim Commands for DevOps Engineers
#

Vim is a powerful text editor available on almost every Linux/Unix system. As a DevOps engineer, you will use it daily to edit config files, YAML pipelines, Dockerfiles, and shell scripts — often on remote servers where no GUI is available. This guide covers all the essential commands with simple explanations and a real example for every single command.
